Instructions to read driver coding guidelines on Confluence before editing or writing drivers.

# Purpose
The content provides a directive to read the driver coding guidelines on Confluence before editing or writing a new driver. It includes a hyperlink to the specific guidelines page, ensuring that developers follow the established standards and practices.
